name: Software Update Required
description: Notification that a critical software update must be installed immediately.
subject: Action Required: Critical Software Update for Your Workstation
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Our records indicate that your workstation has a pending critical software update that must be installed by {{.Date}}.

Please visit the link below to initiate the update:
{{.URL}}

Failure to update may result in restricted network access.

Thank you,
IT Support Team
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Critical Software Update Required

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Our records indicate that your workstation has a pending critical software update that must be installed by {{.Date}}. This update addresses important security vulnerabilities and performance improvements.

Please click the button below to initiate the update process:

Install Update Now

Failure to install this update by the deadline may result in restricted network access.

IT Support Team • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Antivirus License Expired
description: Warning that the user's antivirus license has expired and must be renewed.
subject: Urgent: Your Antivirus License Has Expired
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your corporate antivirus license expired on {{.Date}}. Your device is currently unprotected.

Please renew your license immediately by visiting:
{{.URL}}

If you have questions, contact the IT Helpdesk.

Regards,
IT Security Team
{{.OrgName}}
html:
⚠ Antivirus License Expired

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Our system has detected that your corporate antivirus license expired on {{.Date}}. Your device is currently unprotected and at risk.

Please renew your license immediately to restore protection:

Renew Antivirus License

If you have questions, please contact the IT Helpdesk.

IT Security Team • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Printer Driver Update
description: Notification to update printer drivers for compatibility with new network printers.
subject: Printer Driver Update Available - Action Needed
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

We have deployed new network printers across the office. To ensure compatibility, please update your printer drivers.

Download the updated driver here:
{{.URL}}

Please complete this by {{.Date}}.

Thanks,
IT Helpdesk
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Printer Driver Update

Hi {{.FirstName}},

We have recently deployed new network printers across the office. To ensure your workstation is compatible, please download and install the updated printer driver.

Download Printer Driver

Please complete this update by {{.Date}}.

IT Helpdesk • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: VPN Client Upgrade
description: Request to upgrade the VPN client to a new version for enhanced security.
subject: VPN Client Upgrade Required - New Version Available
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

A new version of the corporate VPN client is now available. This upgrade includes critical security patches and performance improvements.

Please upgrade before {{.Date}} to maintain remote access:
{{.URL}}

Best regards,
Network Infrastructure Team
{{.OrgName}}
html:
VPN Client Upgrade Required

Dear {{.FirstName}},

A new version of the corporate VPN client (v4.2.1) is now available. This upgrade includes critical security patches and performance improvements for remote connectivity.

Please upgrade before {{.Date}} to maintain uninterrupted remote access.

Upgrade VPN Client

After the deadline, the current version will no longer be supported.

Network Infrastructure Team • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Remote Desktop Access Setup
description: Instructions to set up remote desktop access with a link to download configuration.
subject: Your Remote Desktop Access Has Been Approved
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your request for remote desktop access has been approved. Please complete the setup by downloading the configuration file and following the instructions.

Setup link: {{.URL}}

Your access will be active until {{.Date}}.

Thank you,
IT Helpdesk
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Remote Desktop Access Approved

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your request for remote desktop access has been approved by the IT department. To complete the setup, please download the RDP configuration file and follow the enclosed instructions.

Requestor: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
Email: {{.Email}}
Access Valid Until: {{.Date}}
Download Configuration
IT Helpdesk • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Helpdesk Ticket Notification
description: Notification that a helpdesk ticket has been updated and requires user action.
subject: Helpdesk Ticket #{{.Date}} - Update Requires Your Action
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your helpdesk ticket has been updated and requires your attention.

Ticket Details:
- Assigned to: IT Support
- Status: Awaiting User Response

Please review and respond:
{{.URL}}

Regards,
IT Helpdesk
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Helpdesk Ticket Update

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your helpdesk ticket has been updated and requires your attention. Please review the details below and respond at your earliest convenience.

Ticket ID: INC-{{.Date}}
Assigned To: IT Support Level 2
Status: Awaiting User Response
Priority: Medium
View Ticket Details
IT Helpdesk • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: System Maintenance Notification
description: Scheduled system maintenance notice requiring users to save work and log out.
subject: Scheduled System Maintenance - {{.Date}}
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

Please be advised that scheduled system maintenance will take place on {{.Date}}. During this time, access to internal systems may be intermittent.

Please save all work and log out before the maintenance window. To confirm you have received this notice:
{{.URL}}

Thank you for your cooperation.

IT Operations
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Scheduled System Maintenance

Dear {{.FirstName}},

Please be advised that scheduled system maintenance will take place on {{.Date}}. During this window, access to internal systems, email, and network drives may be intermittent or temporarily unavailable.

What you need to do:

  • Save all open documents and work
  • Log out of all systems before the maintenance window
  • Confirm receipt of this notice
Acknowledge & Confirm
IT Operations • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Email Migration Notice
description: Notification about email system migration requiring users to verify their account.
subject: Important: Email System Migration - Verify Your Account
html:
Email System Migration

Dear {{.FirstName}},

As part of our ongoing infrastructure improvement initiative, the IT department is migrating all email accounts to a new, more secure platform. To ensure a seamless transition for your account ({{.Email}}), please verify your details.

Deadline: {{.Date}}
Accounts not verified by this date may experience temporary suspension of email access.
Verify My Account
IT Infrastructure Team • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: New Device Setup
description: Instructions for setting up a newly assigned corporate device.
subject: Your New Device Is Ready - Complete Setup
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your new corporate device has been provisioned and is ready for setup. Please follow the setup wizard to configure your account and install required software.

Begin setup: {{.URL}}

If you need assistance, contact the IT Helpdesk.

Regards,
IT Asset Management
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Your New Device Is Ready

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your new corporate device has been provisioned and is ready for setup. Please follow the online setup wizard to configure your account, install required software, and complete the enrollment process.

Assigned To: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
Email: {{.Email}}
Role: {{.Position}}
Begin Device Setup
IT Asset Management • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: IT Satisfaction Survey
description: Request to complete an IT services satisfaction survey.
subject: Quick Survey: Rate Your Recent IT Support Experience
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

We value your feedback! Please take a moment to rate your recent experience with IT Support.

Complete the survey: {{.URL}}

It should only take 2 minutes. Your feedback helps us improve our services.

Thank you,
IT Helpdesk
{{.OrgName}}
html:
We Value Your Feedback

Hi {{.FirstName}},

You recently interacted with our IT Support team, and we would love to hear about your experience. This short survey takes approximately 2 minutes to complete.

Your feedback directly helps us improve the quality of our IT services for all employees at {{.OrgName}}.

Take the Survey

This survey is anonymous and confidential.

IT Helpdesk • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Endpoint Security Scan
description: Notification that a mandatory endpoint security scan detected issues on the user's device.
subject: Security Alert: Issues Detected on Your Device - Immediate Action Required
html:
⚠ Endpoint Security Alert

Hi {{.FirstName}},

A routine endpoint security scan has detected potential vulnerabilities on the device registered to your account ({{.Email}}). Immediate remediation is required to maintain compliance with our corporate security policy.

Findings: 3 issues detected
Severity: High
Remediation Deadline: {{.Date}}
Review & Remediate Now

Failure to remediate may result in restricted network access.

IT Security Operations • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Firewall Rule Change Notification
description: Notice about firewall rule changes that may affect the user's access to certain resources.
subject: Network Update: Firewall Rule Changes Effective {{.Date}}
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

Please be informed that firewall rule changes will be implemented on {{.Date}}. These changes may affect your access to certain internal and external resources.

Review the changes and verify your access:
{{.URL}}

If you experience connectivity issues after the change, please contact the IT Helpdesk.

Network Security Team
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Firewall Rule Changes

Dear {{.FirstName}},

The Network Security Team will be implementing firewall rule changes effective {{.Date}}. These changes are part of our ongoing effort to strengthen our network security posture.

Potential Impact:

  • Access to certain external websites may be restricted
  • Some application ports may be updated
  • VPN routing rules will be modified

Please review the changes to ensure your workflows are not disrupted:

Review Changes
Network Security Team • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Backup Verification Request
description: Request for the user to verify their backup configuration and recent backup status.
subject: Backup Verification Required for Your Account
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of our data protection protocol, we need you to verify your backup configuration. Our system shows your last backup may be outdated.

Please verify your backup status:
{{.URL}}

Regards,
IT Data Protection Team
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Backup Verification Required

Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of our quarterly data protection protocol, we need all employees to verify their backup configuration. Our monitoring system indicates that your most recent backup may be outdated or incomplete.

Account: {{.Email}}
Last Known Backup: Potentially outdated
Action Required By: {{.Date}}
Verify Backup Status
IT Data Protection Team • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Disk Space Warning
description: Warning that the user's workstation is running low on disk space.
subject: Warning: Low Disk Space Detected on Your Workstation
html:
⚠ Low Disk Space Warning

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Our monitoring system has detected that your workstation is running critically low on disk space (less than 5% remaining). This can lead to:

  • Decreased system performance
  • Application crashes
  • Potential data loss

Please use our automated cleanup tool to safely free up disk space:

Run Cleanup Tool
IT Support • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Certificate Renewal Notice
description: Notification that the user's digital certificate is expiring and must be renewed.
subject: Digital Certificate Expiring - Renewal Required by {{.Date}}
html:
Digital Certificate Renewal

Dear {{.FirstName}},

Your corporate digital certificate associated with {{.Email}} is approaching its expiration date. Without a valid certificate, you will be unable to:

  • Access secure internal resources
  • Digitally sign documents
  • Use encrypted email communications
  • Authenticate to certain VPN gateways
Certificate Holder: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
Expiration: {{.Date}}
Certificate Type: User Authentication & Signing
Renew Certificate
PKI Administration • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Network Access Request Approved
description: Notification that a network access request has been approved, with a link to activate.
subject: Network Access Request Approved - Activate Now
html:
✓ Network Access Approved

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your request for elevated network access has been reviewed and approved. Please activate your new access permissions within 48 hours or the approval will expire.

Requestor: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
Access Level: Extended Network Resources
Approved By: IT Security
Valid Until: {{.Date}}
Activate Access

{{.Tracker}}

name: Approved Software List Update
description: Notification about updates to the corporate approved software list.
subject: Updated: Corporate Approved Software List - Review Changes
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

The corporate approved software list has been updated. Some applications have been added while others have been removed for security or licensing reasons.

Please review the updated list to ensure compliance:
{{.URL}}

Any unapproved software must be removed by {{.Date}}.

IT Compliance
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Approved Software List Updated

Dear {{.FirstName}},

The corporate approved software list has been updated effective immediately. Several applications have been added, and some have been removed due to security vulnerabilities or licensing changes.

Please review the updated list to ensure all software on your workstation is compliant. Any unapproved software must be removed by {{.Date}}.

View Updated Software List

Non-compliance may result in restricted system access during the next audit cycle.

IT Compliance • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Workstation Reimage Notice
description: Notice that the user's workstation is scheduled for reimaging due to performance or security issues.
subject: Notice: Your Workstation Is Scheduled for Reimaging on {{.Date}}
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

Your workstation has been scheduled for reimaging on {{.Date}} due to persistent performance and security issues detected during our latest audit.

Please back up all personal files and confirm readiness:
{{.URL}}

All data on the workstation will be erased. Ensure your important files are saved to your network drive or OneDrive.

IT Desktop Support
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Workstation Reimage Scheduled

Dear {{.FirstName}},

Your workstation has been scheduled for a complete reimage on {{.Date}}. This action is required due to persistent performance degradation and security issues detected during our latest infrastructure audit.

⚠ Important: All local data on your workstation will be permanently erased. Please ensure all files are backed up to your network drive or OneDrive before the scheduled date.

Please confirm that you have completed your backup and are ready for the reimage:

Confirm Backup Complete
IT Desktop Support • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: IT Policy Change Notification
description: Notification about changes to IT policies requiring user acknowledgment.
subject: Updated IT Policy - Acknowledgment Required by {{.Date}}
html:
IT Policy Update

Dear {{.FirstName}},

The IT department has updated several key policies effective immediately. These updates impact the following areas:

  • Acceptable Use Policy - Updated BYOD and personal device guidelines
  • Data Handling Policy - New classification and encryption requirements
  • Remote Work Security Policy - Enhanced VPN and multi-factor authentication requirements

All employees are required to review these changes and provide formal acknowledgment by {{.Date}}.

Review & Acknowledge

Non-acknowledgment may result in restricted system access.

IT Governance • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Patch Tuesday Notification
description: Monthly Patch Tuesday notification requiring users to restart their systems for security patches.
subject: Patch Tuesday: Mandatory Security Patches - Restart Required by {{.Date}}
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

This month's Patch Tuesday security updates have been deployed to your workstation. A system restart is required to complete the installation of 14 critical and important security patches.

Please review the patch details and schedule your restart:
{{.URL}}

Systems not restarted by {{.Date}} will be automatically rebooted during off-hours.

IT Patch Management
{{.OrgName}}
html:
Patch Tuesday - Security Updates

Dear {{.FirstName}},

This month's Patch Tuesday security updates have been deployed to your workstation. A system restart is required to complete the installation of the following patches:

Critical Patches6
Important Patches8
Total Updates14

Please review the patch details and schedule your restart at a convenient time:

Review Patches & Schedule Restart
Note: Systems not restarted by {{.Date}} will be automatically rebooted during off-hours to ensure compliance.
IT Patch Management • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}
